name: floating-clock
description: Always-on-top floating desktop clock for macOS — multi-file Objective-C NSPanel with three-segment dashboard (LOCAL · ACTIVE MARKETS · NEXT TO OPEN). 7 bundled profiles (Default / Day Trader / Night Owl / Minimalist / Researcher / Watch Party / Auction Watcher) + 12 Quick Style moods (Brutalist / Zen / Retro CRT / Executive / Neon / Hacker / Glacier / Midnight / Featherlight / Industrial / Trading Floor / Scholar). 12 major exchanges with live 5-state session tracking (OPEN · LUNCH · PRE-MARKET · AFTER-HOURS · CLOSED) — amber ◐ dawn + rose ◒ dusk auction signals, gated by the user-configurable SessionSignalWindow (off / 5-60 min). Rocket-launch T-HH:MM:SS countdown (progressive to T-Nd Hh MMm at ≥24h). Urgency-tiered green/amber/red. Tabulated sections with frosted-glass. Aesthetic surface: 27 color themes · 12 progress-bar glyphs · 8 corner styles · 7 shadow presets · 7 segment-gap presets · 7 font weights (thin → black) · 7 letter-spacing values · 7 line-spacing values · 7 time-separator glyphs · 6 density profiles · 5-phase sun/moon glyph · global + per-segment FontWeight/Transparency · 9 DateFormat locales. v1.8 completes the typography-trilogy bracket expansion (LetterSpacing/LineSpacing/TimeSeparator 5 → 7 each), ships the Auction Watcher profile + Trading Floor/Scholar/Featherlight/Industrial moods, fixes the NEXT render loop (iter-141) so PRE/AFTER glyphs actually appear, and locks state invariants across 24h sweeps for NYSE + TSE. 53 fixtures across test_session.m + test_levers.m. Sub-0.1% idle CPU, ~216 KB signed binary.
